brief: Deadly wildfires in Spain and rising Iran tensions dominate headlines, while new research explores AI for crime linkage and missing data diagnosis.
news_summary: Spain battles deadly wildfires with 12 dead including British nationals; Hunter Biden awarded $1.7M in defamation suit; Iran-US tensions escalate with top diplomat in Oman for talks.
papers_summary: Studies propose AI-assisted crime linkage analysis and a visual analytics dashboard for missing data; brain-computer interface trials in China are reviewed.

en.brief: Deadly wildfires in Spain and rising Iran tensions dominate headlines, while new research explores AI for crime linkage and missing data diagnosis.
en.news_summary: Spain battles deadly wildfires with 12 dead including British nationals; Hunter Biden awarded $1.7M in defamation suit; Iran-US tensions escalate with top diplomat in Oman for talks.
en.papers_summary: Studies propose AI-assisted crime linkage analysis and a visual analytics dashboard for missing data; brain-computer interface trials in China are reviewed.

zh.brief: 颱風巴威接連侵襲台灣與中國東部，浙江等地撤離逾76萬人；德國宣判跨國華人性侵案，核心成員落網。同時西班牙森林大火導致至少12人死亡，澳洲發現世界最快蜘蛛。
zh.news_summary: 颱風巴威暴風圈進入台灣陸地，造成15萬戶停電，中國浙江等地撤離逾76萬人。德國宣判由華人組成的「老司機駕校」Telegram性侵案，多名核心成員被判刑。
zh.papers_summary: 《ImputeViz》提出可視化儀表板診斷缺失數據；《How Analysts Use AI in High-Stakes Crime Linkage》探討AI在犯罪串聯中的應用；《Clinical Translation of Brain-Computer Interface in China》分析中國腦機介面臨床試驗現狀。

todays_image.caption: The long, spindly legs of the Pycnogonida evoke the far-reaching, destructive tendrils of Spain’s deadliest wildfire.
todays_image.title: Pycnogonida
